title: LangGraph Academy: Building Structured Agent Workflows
description: The official course for learning LangGraph. Covers state schemas, node routing, conditional edges, persistence checkpointers, and handling human-in-the-loop approvals.

title: Qdrant Vector Database Boot Camp
description: Comprehensive guide on vector search mechanics, distance metrics, payloads, and implementing filters and hybrid search using Qdrant.

title: Pydantic v2: Data Validation & Structured Output for LLMs
description: Official documentation and guides on Pydantic v2. Focuses on field validation, custom serialization, and structured outputs from LLMs using JSON Schemas.

title: LLM Evaluation and Guardrails (Ragas & DeepEval)
description: A guide on implementing deterministic and model-graded evaluations for RAG pipelines, checking correctness, faithfulness, and answer relevance.

title: Dockerizing Python Microservices with FastAPI
description: Hands-on walkthrough for package management, writing multi-stage Dockerfiles, caching dependency layers, and launching FastAPI endpoints in containerized settings.

title: Advanced Streamlit: Custom Components and Session States
description: Official guides explaining session state synchronization, form submit workflows, reruns, and layout customization for building professional developer tooling.
